title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025 days before landfall in Jamaica. The model provided high-confidence signals that enabled meteorologists and authorities to issue timely evacuation warnings for the Category 5 storm.
